summary: Officina Quality Score gamification feature fully tested - all 17 backend API tests passed and frontend widget displays correctly with radial progress, breakdown bars, and clickable insights.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user data with 5 rilievi, 5 POS, 5 invoices, 10 preventivi, 4 distinte
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quality Score feature complete. Backend: GET /api/dashboard/quality-score returns total_score (0-100), level (Maestro>80, Esperto>60, Crescita>40, Apprendista<40), breakdown with 5 categories (safety:30, ce:25, documentation:20, photos:10, activity:15), insights array (top 3 by points). Frontend: QualityScoreWidget at /dashboard displays radial SVG progress bar (green>80, yellow>50, red<50), level badge, 5 breakdown bars with labels, and clickable insights that navigate to action routes.

backend_api.total_score_field: PASS - Response contains total_score (59) in 0-100 range
backend_api.level_field: PASS - Response contains level ('Artigiano in Crescita')
backend_api.level_matches_score: PASS - Score 59 correctly maps to 'Crescita' level (40-59 range)
backend_api.breakdown_5_categories: PASS - Breakdown has safety, ce, documentation, photos, activity
backend_api.breakdown_structure: PASS - Each category has score, max, label
backend_api.breakdown_max_values: PASS - Max values: safety=30, ce=25, documentation=20, photos=10, activity=15 (total=100)
backend_api.insights_structure: PASS - Each insight has type, text, action, points
backend_api.insights_max_three: PASS - Insights limited to 3 (top by points)
backend_api.insights_sorted: PASS - Insights sorted by points descending
backend_api.stats_object: PASS - Response contains stats with document counts

frontend_ui.radial_progress_bar: PASS - SVG radial progress bar displays score (59)
frontend_ui.level_badge: PASS - data-testid='quality-level' shows 'Artigiano in Crescita' with amber color
frontend_ui.insight_navigation: PASS - Clicking insight navigates to action route (/certificazioni)
frontend_ui.design_contrast: PASS - White card background with dark text - good contrast
frontend_ui.widget_header: PASS - 'Officina Quality Score' title with Shield icon
